name: storybook-workbench
description: Storybook CSF3 toolkit — audit, capture, author, and ship Storybook for React+Vite apps as focused skills.

plugins.name: storybook-workbench
plugins.description: The full bundle: hub (/sb-hub: onboarding check + orchestrator + navigator) + 9 standalone skills (sb-setup, sb-inventory, sb-health, sb-flows, sb-stories, sb-wrappers, sb-explore, sb-ship, sb-audit) over a shared agent pool.
